caption: Phil, you on tomorrow? Triage is already backed up past the waiting room doors by 10am today. Stamford humidity not helping anyone's mood either.
Yeah I'm on at 7. Manny called out again so it'll just be us and whoever floats over. Should be fun.
Third time this month. Guy's got a gift.
You pulling main or peds bay?
Main. Peds bay on a Tuesday after a holiday weekend is not something I'm doing voluntarily.
Fair call. Heads up — last coffee pot was empty by 7:15 this morning. Hit it before you hit the floor.
Already two in. Third's brewing now. I don't come to Harborview unprepared.
See you at 7 then. Try not to cure everything before I get there.
Morning run on the Mianus River trail. 3.8 miles, legs finally awake.
Grill's earning its keep this weekend. Ribs low and slow.
The workbench is taking shape. Mortises cut, dry-fit clean.
Sunday pancakes, non-negotiable in this house.
Springsteen on vinyl, Ed's old copy. Still hits.
Housatonic at dawn. Fly rod, coffee, no pager.
Nolan's varsity match — that assist was a thing of beauty.
Chloe's flute recital. Proud dad in the third row.
Black drip coffee and a WWII history before the shift.
OBX countdown. The house, the porch, the whole week off.
Local IPA earned after a 12-hour floor day.
Church coffee hour, Chloe on the espresso machine.
Garage bookshelf done, workbench next. Sawdust everywhere.
UConn basketball with the kids. Loud house tonight.
Liverpool at the pub with Tom. Nervy finish.
Fresh gutters, clean lines. Fall projects underway.
Scranton visit — Dad's garage, same tools, same stories.
Bridgeport brunch with Marie. Good to slow down.
Mianus trail in the rain. Still worth it.
New IPA flight at Coastal Drafts. The hazy one won.
